scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-core build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-mcp build && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp build && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-mcp build && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-toolkit build && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-http-agent-server build && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-http-agent-client build && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-agent-runtime build && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-react build && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-react-ui build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-runtime build && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-channel-runtime build && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-engine-plugin-codex-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-engine-plugin-claude-agent-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-codex-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-plugin-codex-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-claude-code-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-plugin-claude-code-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-openclaw-compat build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-server build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-agent-chat-ui build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-ui build && pnpm -C apps/platform-console build && pnpm -C apps/platform-admin build && pnpm -C apps/desktop build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw build && pnpm -C workers/marketplace-api build && pnpm -C workers/nextclaw-provider-gateway-api build
scripts.lint: pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-core lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-mcp lint && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp lint && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-mcp lint && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-toolkit lint && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-http-agent-server lint && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-http-agent-client lint && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-agent-runtime lint && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-react lint && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-react-ui lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-runtime lint && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-channel-runtime lint && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-engine-plugin-codex-sdk lint && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-engine-plugin-claude-agent-sdk lint && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-codex-sdk lint && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-plugin-codex-sdk lint && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-claude-code-sdk lint && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-plugin-claude-code-sdk lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-openclaw-compat lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-server lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-agent-chat-ui lint && pnpm -C apps/platform-console lint && pnpm -C apps/platform-admin lint && pnpm -C apps/desktop lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw lint && pnpm -C workers/marketplace-api lint && pnpm -C workers/nextclaw-provider-gateway-api lint
scripts.tsc: pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-core tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-mcp tsc && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp tsc && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-mcp tsc && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-toolkit tsc && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-http-agent-server tsc && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-http-agent-client tsc && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-agent-runtime tsc && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-react tsc && pnpm -C packages/ncp-packages/nextclaw-ncp-react-ui tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-runtime tsc && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-channel-runtime tsc && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-engine-plugin-codex-sdk tsc && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-engine-plugin-claude-agent-sdk tsc && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-codex-sdk tsc && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-plugin-codex-sdk tsc && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-claude-code-sdk tsc && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-ncp-runtime-plugin-claude-code-sdk tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-openclaw-compat tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-server tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-agent-chat-ui tsc && pnpm -C apps/platform-console tsc && pnpm -C apps/platform-admin tsc && pnpm -C apps/desktop tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw tsc && pnpm -C workers/marketplace-api tsc && pnpm -C workers/nextclaw-provider-gateway-api tsc
scripts.validate:platform:mvp: pnpm -C workers/nextclaw-provider-gateway-api build && pnpm -C workers/nextclaw-provider-gateway-api lint && pnpm -C workers/nextclaw-provider-gateway-api tsc && pnpm -C apps/platform-console build && pnpm -C apps/platform-console lint && pnpm -C apps/platform-console tsc && pnpm -C apps/platform-admin build && pnpm -C apps/platform-admin lint && pnpm -C apps/platform-admin tsc && pnpm smoke:platform:mvp
scripts.release:check: pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm tsc
scripts.release:version: pnpm release:sync-readmes && pnpm release:check-readmes && pnpm changeset version
scripts.release:publish: pnpm release:sync-readmes && pnpm release:check-readmes && pnpm release:check && pnpm changeset publish && pnpm changeset tag
scripts.release:frontend: node scripts/release-frontend.mjs && pnpm release:version && pnpm release:publish
scripts.release: pnpm changeset && pnpm release:version && pnpm release:publish
scripts.deploy:landing: pnpm --filter @nextclaw/landing build && pnpm dlx wrangler pages deploy apps/landing/dist --project-name nextclaw-landing --branch master
scripts.deploy:docs: pnpm --filter @nextclaw/docs build && pnpm dlx wrangler pages deploy apps/docs/.vitepress/dist --project-name nextclaw-docs --branch master
scripts.deploy:platform:console: pnpm -C apps/platform-console build && pnpm dlx wrangler pages deploy apps/platform-console/dist --project-name nextclaw-platform-console --branch master --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:platform:admin: pnpm -C apps/platform-admin build && pnpm dlx wrangler pages deploy apps/platform-admin/dist --project-name nextclaw-platform-admin --branch master --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:platform:backend: pnpm platform:db:migrate:remote && pnpm -C workers/nextclaw-provider-gateway-api run deploy
scripts.deploy:platform: pnpm deploy:platform:backend && pnpm deploy:platform:console && pnpm deploy:platform:admin
